sections.name: Seller Information
sections.description: Details of the company issuing the invoice, including name, address, phone, and email.

sections.name: Invoice Details
sections.description: Key identifiers and dates for the invoice, such as invoice number, invoice date, due date, and customer ID.

sections.name: Billing Information
sections.description: Details of the customer to whom the invoice is addressed, including company name, address, and email.

sections.name: Product Line Items
sections.description: A repeated structure detailing each product or service, including description, quantity, unit price, and total.

sections.name: Invoice Summary
sections.description: The financial summary of the invoice, including subtotal, sales tax, shipping charges, and the total amount due.

sections.name: Additional Notes
sections.description: Any additional comments or instructions present on the invoice, such as handwritten notes.
